description: The annual physical inventory walk-through has been completed. Reconcile the Snipe-IT asset database with the following audit findings. Mark ASSET-AUD01 and ASSET-AUD04 as audited. Update ASSET-AUD02's default location to 'Main Campus - Building B' and mark it as audited. Change the status of ASSET-AUD03 to 'Lost/Stolen' with the note 'Not found during physical inventory audit - Building A'. Change the status of ASSET-AUD05 to 'Lost/Stolen' with the note 'Not found during physical inventory audit - Building B'.
